title: The3dColors
description: Colored Leaves/Dyed Leaves, and more dyed blocks coming soon!!!
body:
![Logo and some textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52e401008575d57c47f5458f6c85e6da58749aff.png)

# What is this mod?
A mod aiming to bring more color to your world with the addition of colored leaves! As of version 1.0.1, there are oak, birch, spruce, jungle, mangrove, and acacia leaves in all 16 colors! In future versions, more dyed blocks will be added!

## What is the point in more colored blocks?
Version 1.0.1 brings 96 new leaf blocks to the game. Meaning if you wanted an autumn forest with bright and dark red, yellow, and orange trees, you can. Or if you wished the evergreen trees in your world to be a bunch of different shades of green instead of Minecraft's base ones.

## Planned updates
- Colored moss.
- Dark oak colored leaves with darker shades. 
- Azalea & Flowering azalea colored leaves.
